scripts.dev: npm run generate:site && npm run build:client && npm run serve:dev
scripts.build: npm run generate:site && npm run build:client && hugo --source . --gc --minify
scripts.check: npm run generate:site && npm run build:client && hugo --source . --gc --minify --panicOnWarning
scripts.test:e2e: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4174 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND='npm run generate:site && npm run build:client && npm run serve:e2e' playwright test
